Vanguard and Equinox have led to failures (Task-52, 101) due to complexity/deadlines. Moving forward, I will prioritize Cortex tasks with full-team assignments for maximum speed and salary bumps until payroll/runway requires more diversity. Runway is healthy at 8+ months.
Strategy 5: Equinox Labs failure (Task-179) confirms they are high risk. I assigned 8 employees but the throughput split (rate/sqrt(N)) slowed completion below the deadline. Avoid running 3+ large tasks simultaneously with the same team. Limit concurrency to 2 tasks to maintain >70% individual throughput. Prioritizing Helix and Cortex for reliability.
Strategy 6: Equinox Labs tasks (Task-11, 77) failed even with full team assignment. This indicates that prestige/trust requirements alone don't reflect difficulty. High-prestige Equinox tasks are high-risk. I must return to Prism Analytics or other reliable clients for safer 100% throughput focus.
